name: Google Drive
description: Access and manage files in your Google Drive
description_zh: 访问和管理 Google Drive 中的文件

mcp_config.name: google-drive
mcp_config.description: Google Drive - list, read, search files and folders

auth.help_text: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials in Google Cloud Console with Drive API enabled
auth.help_text_zh: 在 Google Cloud Console 创建 OAuth 2.0 凭据并启用 Drive API

name: PostgreSQL
description: Query and explore your PostgreSQL databases
description_zh: 查询和探索你的 PostgreSQL 数据库

mcp_config.name: postgres
mcp_config.description: PostgreSQL - query, describe tables, explore schema

auth.help_text: Provide your PostgreSQL connection string (e.g. postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db)
auth.help_text_zh: 提供你的 PostgreSQL 连接字符串（如 postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db）

name: File System
description: Read, write, and manage files on the local filesystem
description_zh: 读取、写入和管理本地文件系统中的文件

mcp_config.name: filesystem
mcp_config.description: Local filesystem - read, write, list, search files
